fields.name: tags
fields.description: Freeform labels for filtering and categorization

entityKinds.name: Feature
entityKinds.description: A user-facing capability that solves a specific problem

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of the feature

fields.name: problem
fields.description: The user problem this feature addresses

fields.name: solution
fields.description: How this feature solves the stated problem

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Importance level: critical, high, medium, or low

fields.name: status
fields.description: Lifecycle state: proposed, accepted, in_progress, done, deferred, or deprecated

fields.name: acceptance
fields.description: Criteria that must be met for the feature to be considered complete

fields.name: depends_on
fields.description: Other features that must be completed before this one

fields.name: features
fields.description: Related features referenced by this feature

fields.name: refs
fields.description: External references such as issues, URLs, or documents

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Justification for the current status or a status change

fields.name: owner
fields.description: Person or team responsible for this feature

fields.name: contributors
fields.description: Additional people or teams contributing to this feature

fields.name: effort
fields.description: T-shirt size estimate: xs, s, m, l, or xl

entityKinds.name: Journey
entityKinds.description: A user journey through the product experience

fields.name: persona
fields.description: The user archetype who undertakes this journey

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of the journey

fields.name: channels
fields.description: Communication or distribution channels used in this journey

fields.name: features
fields.description: Features exercised during this journey

fields.name: flow
fields.description: Ordered steps the user takes through the journey

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Importance level: critical, high, medium, or low

entityKinds.name: Deliverable
entityKinds.description: A shippable unit of work with dependencies and milestones

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of the deliverable

fields.name: artifact_type
fields.description: Kind of artifact produced: cli, service, library, web_app, mobile_app, api, extension, documentation, or package

fields.name: status
fields.description: Lifecycle state: draft, in_progress, shipped, or deprecated

fields.name: journeys
fields.description: User journeys this deliverable supports

fields.name: modules
fields.description: Modules included in this deliverable

fields.name: version
fields.description: Semantic version of this deliverable

fields.name: milestones
fields.description: Milestones this deliverable is tracked under

fields.name: depends_on
fields.description: Other deliverables that must ship before this one

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Justification for the current status or a status change

fields.name: owner
fields.description: Person or team responsible for this deliverable

fields.name: contributors
fields.description: Additional people or teams contributing to this deliverable

entityKinds.name: Milestone
entityKinds.description: A significant project checkpoint with tracked progress

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of the milestone

fields.name: status
fields.description: Lifecycle state: planned, in_progress, completed, or blocked

fields.name: features
fields.description: Features that must be delivered to complete this milestone

fields.name: exit_criteria
fields.description: Conditions that must be met to consider the milestone complete

fields.name: target_date
fields.description: Planned completion date for this milestone

fields.name: start_date
fields.description: Date when work on this milestone began or is planned to begin

fields.name: modules
fields.description: Modules scoped to this milestone

fields.name: depends_on
fields.description: Other milestones that must be completed before this one

fields.name: blockers
fields.description: Outstanding issues preventing progress on this milestone

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Importance level: critical, high, medium, or low

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Justification for the current status or a status change

fields.name: owner
fields.description: Person or team responsible for this milestone

fields.name: contributors
fields.description: Additional people or teams contributing to this milestone

fields.name: refs
fields.description: External references such as issues, URLs, or documents

entityKinds.name: Module
entityKinds.description: A logical grouping of related features and behaviors

fields.name: family
fields.description: Category or family this module belongs to

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of the module

fields.name: features
fields.description: Features contained within this module

fields.name: depends_on
fields.description: Other modules this module depends on

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Justification for this module's existence or grouping

entityKinds.name: Term
entityKinds.description: A glossary entry defining domain-specific vocabulary

fields.name: definition
fields.description: The precise meaning of this term in the project's domain

fields.name: context
fields.description: Where or how this term is typically used

fields.name: aliases
fields.description: Alternative names or abbreviations for this term

fields.name: see_also
fields.description: Related terms for cross-referencing

fields.name: module
fields.description: The module (bounded context) that owns this term's definition

entityKinds.name: Persona
entityKinds.description: A user archetype representing a target audience segment

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of this persona

fields.name: technical_level
fields.description: Technical proficiency of this persona (e.g., beginner, intermediate, expert)

fields.name: goals
fields.description: What this persona wants to achieve with the product

fields.name: pain_points
fields.description: Frustrations or problems this persona currently faces

fields.name: status
fields.description: Whether this persona is active or deprecated

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Justification for the current status or a status change

fields.name: key_features
fields.description: Features this persona cares about most

entityKinds.name: Channel
entityKinds.description: A communication or distribution channel for the product

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of this channel

fields.name: interaction_model
fields.description: How users interact through this channel (e.g., sync, async, push, pull)

fields.name: url
fields.description: URL or endpoint for this channel

fields.name: status
fields.description: Whether this channel is active or deprecated

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Justification for the current status or a status change

entityKinds.name: Release
entityKinds.description: A versioned product release bundling deliverables

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of this release

fields.name: version
fields.description: Semantic version identifier for this release

fields.name: status
fields.description: Lifecycle state of the release

fields.name: deliverables
fields.description: Deliverables included in this release

fields.name: milestones
fields.description: Milestones completed by this release

fields.name: target_date
fields.description: Planned release date

fields.name: release_date
fields.description: Actual date the release shipped

fields.name: changelog
fields.description: Summary of changes included in this release

fields.name: depends_on
fields.description: Prior releases that must ship before this one

fields.name: owner
fields.description: Person or team responsible for this release

fields.name: contributors
fields.description: Additional people or teams contributing to this release

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Justification for the current status or a status change

fields.name: refs
fields.description: External references such as issues, URLs, or documents

entityKinds.name: Capability
entityKinds.description: A high-level product capability mapping personas to features via a flow

fields.name: persona
fields.description: The user archetype who uses this capability

fields.name: channels
fields.description: Channels or touchpoints through which this capability is accessed

fields.name: features
fields.description: Features that compose this capability

fields.name: flow
fields.description: Description of the interaction flow for this capability

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of this capability

entityKinds.name: Library
entityKinds.description: A reusable code library with defined ports and dependencies

fields.name: family
fields.description: Category or family this library belongs to

fields.name: features
fields.description: Features this library provides or supports

fields.name: depends_on
fields.description: Other libraries this library depends on

fields.name: ports_defined
fields.description: Ports (interfaces) defined by this library

fields.name: ports_consumed
fields.description: Ports (interfaces) consumed by this library

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of this library

entityKinds.name: Roadmap
entityKinds.description: A strategic plan grouping features, behaviors, and libraries into a phased timeline

fields.name: status
fields.description: Lifecycle state of this roadmap

fields.name: behaviors
fields.description: Behaviors planned in this roadmap

fields.name: features
fields.description: Features planned in this roadmap

fields.name: libraries
fields.description: Libraries planned in this roadmap

fields.name: criteria
fields.description: Success criteria for this roadmap phase

fields.name: depends_on
fields.description: Other roadmaps that must be completed before this one

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable summary of this roadmap

edgeTypes.label: FeatureRelatesTo
edgeTypes.description: Feature has a non-dependency relationship to another feature

edgeTypes.label: TermBelongsToModule
edgeTypes.description: Term is defined within a module's bounded context

edgeTypes.label: CapabilityUsesChannel
edgeTypes.description: Capability is accessed through a channel

validationRules.messageTemplate: feature '{id}' has invalid status '{value}' — expected one of: proposed, accepted, in_progress, done, deferred, deprecated
{kind} '{id}' has invalid priority '{value}' — expected one of: critical, high, medium, low
{kind} '{id}' has invalid priority '{value}' — expected one of: critical, high, medium, low
{kind} '{id}' has invalid priority '{value}' — expected one of: critical, high, medium, low
{kind} '{id}' has invalid priority '{value}' — expected one of: critical, high, medium, low
milestone '{id}' has invalid status '{value}' — expected one of: planned, in_progress, completed, blocked
deliverable '{id}' has invalid artifact_type '{value}' — expected one of: cli, service, library, web_app, mobile_app, api, extension, documentation, package
persona '{id}' has invalid status '{value}' — expected one of: active, deprecated
channel '{id}' has invalid status '{value}' — expected one of: active, deprecated
deliverable '{id}' has invalid status '{value}' — expected one of: draft, in_progress, shipped, deprecated
feature '{id}' has invalid effort '{value}' — expected one of: xs, s, m, l, xl
feature '{id}' has no incoming edges — it may be unreferenced by any journey, milestone, or module
journey '{id}' has no incoming edges — it may be unreferenced by any deliverable
module '{id}' has no incoming edges — it may be unreferenced by any deliverable or milestone
term '{id}' has no edges — it may be unreferenced
persona '{id}' has no incoming edges — it may be unreferenced by any journey
channel '{id}' has no incoming edges — it may be unreferenced by any journey
module dependency cycle detected involving '{id}'
milestone dependency cycle detected involving '{id}'
deliverable dependency cycle detected involving '{id}'
feature dependency cycle detected involving '{id}'
release dependency cycle detected involving '{id}'
release '{id}' has invalid version format — expected semver (e.g., 1.0.0)
library dependency cycle detected involving '{id}'
roadmap dependency cycle detected involving '{id}'
milestone '{id}' has no features and no modules — it may be empty
roadmap '{id}' has invalid status '{value}' — expected one of: draft, active, completed, archived
